title: Radiant Rustic German Cheese Salad
description: A briny, gooey German-inspired salad featuring shredded Monterey Jack cheese, pickled veggies, smoked accents, and a creamy egg topping.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine shredded Monterey Jack cheese, diced pickled cucumbers, sliced radishes, and sliced olives.
Drizzle olive oil over the mixture and toss gently to coat.
Sprinkle sea salt, smoked paprika, and German mustard over the salad, then stir until evenly distributed.
Fold in fresh dill and rye bread croutons, allowing the crumbs to soften slightly.
Arrange sliced boiled egg on top of the salad as a decorative element.
Chill the salad in the refrigerator for 15 minutes to meld flavors.
Prior to serving, give the salad a final gentle toss.
Plate the salad on a chilled ceramic dish and garnish with a few extra dill sprigs.
